async def project_dashboard(update, context):
    msg='📊 PROJECT DASHBOARD

✅ Active Projects: AutoPilot Hub
🚀 AI Factory: Running
👑 CEO: Sameer Ahmad
📌 Status: Under AI worker control'
    await update.message.reply_text(msg)

app.add_handler(CommandHandler('projects', project_dashboard))

app.run_polling(drop_pending_updates=True)
